title: Competencies Developed in Year 2

major_changes: Word count optimization achieved through condensing prose
Removed redundancy while maintaining all critical content
content_preserved: All team member references (Sam, Leo, David, Harry)
All specific failure stories and metrics
All 'I felt...' statements and personal struggles

grade_estimate.rationale: All marking criteria met through better writing, not content removal. Word count now within target range while maintaining depth, authenticity, and Values & Ethics dimensions.

learning_outcomes_met: Connection to UWE TE Competency Framework
Professional values and ethics dimension addressed
strengths: Target achieved: 823 words hits 600-900 sweet spot
No loss of depth: All critical insights preserved
Better flow: Removal of redundancy enhances readability
Enhanced impact: Tighter writing makes insights hit harder
Balanced coverage: Each competency gets equal weight
Values & Ethics intact: All ethical dimensions preserved
key_insights: Word count reduction achieved through better writing, not content removal
All self-awareness, patterns, and team situations remain
Tighter prose removes explanation OF insights, not insights themselves
Result is stronger, not weaker—more impactful because every word carries weight
next_steps: Awaiting user feedback on word count satisfaction
Ready for final review or iteration 3 if further refinement needed
